content.callout_body: Violations of youth protection laws will be pursued consistently — including reporting to the relevant authorities where required.
content.p_access: Use of Subm8 is permitted only for adults. By registering, you confirm that you are at least 18 years old.
content.proof_li_1: We may require verification (e.g., ID upload or external providers).
content.proof_li_2: Without successful verification, access to certain features may be restricted.
content.protection_li_1: False age information leads to immediate account suspension.
content.protection_li_2: Content involving minors is strictly prohibited and will be reported and removed immediately.

guidelines.callout_body: Use the reporting function if boundaries are crossed. Our team reviews reports promptly and proportionately.

list.li_1: 18+ only — no minors, no content involving minors.
list.li_3: Respectful conduct — no hate speech, no discrimination, no bullying.
list.li_4: NSFW content — allowed, but correctly labeled (e.g., NSFW flag).
list.li_5: Privacy — do not share private data without consent.
list.li_6: Spam & advertising — prohibited unless clearly labeled and compliant.
list.li_7: Report abuse — violations can be reported; repetition leads to action.

guidelines.subtitle: Respect, consent, and safety first.
guidelines.title: Community Guidelines

content.adult_note: Note: This platform is exclusively for adult users. Content may be NSFW/adult.

imprint.subtitle: Provider identification per § 5 TMG / EU law.
imprint.title: Imprint

content.audience_li_2: Content may include NSFW / adult content.
content.audience_li_3: We reserve the right to request identity or age verification.
content.callout_body: Supplementary documents: Privacy Policy, Imprint, Community Guidelines, Refund Policy, Age Verification.
content.liability_li_1: We are not liable for user behavior.
content.liability_li_2: Use is at your own risk.
content.p_changes: We reserve the right to adapt these terms. We will inform you in good time about material changes.
content.p_roles: Subm8 enables interactions between Dommes and Subs.
content.p_scope: These Terms of Service apply to the use of the Subm8 platform (“platform,” “we”) by registered users (“users,” “you”). By registering, you agree to these terms.
content.payments_li_1: Dommes can receive payments (tips, subscriptions, communities).
content.payments_li_2: Subm8 charges a platform fee plus any provider fees.
content.payments_li_3: Payouts from a minimum amount (shown in the dashboard).
content.payments_li_4: No liability for chargebacks or external payment issues.
content.roles_li_1: You only upload content for which you own the rights.
content.roles_li_3: Prohibited: glorification of violence, non-consensual content, minors, discrimination.
content.termination_li_1: You can delete your account at any time.
content.termination_li_2: We may suspend accounts or remove content if laws or these terms are violated.

content.callout_body: We list details about providers and storage locations in the technical docs and in the dashboard (“Legal & Privacy”).
content.data_li_2: Profile data (avatar, banner, bio, community memberships)
content.data_li_3: Payment data (tips, subscriptions, wallet balances, payouts)
content.data_li_4: Usage data (logins, feed interactions, message metadata)
content.p_controller: Subm8 (Operator: [Your name / company], [address], [email]) is responsible for processing personal data on this platform.
content.p_cookies: Subm8 uses necessary cookies for login and security. Analytics — if present — is performed anonymized/pseudonymized.
content.p_retention: Stored as long as your account is active. After deletion: deletion or anonymization unless legal retention obligations apply.
content.purpose_li_1: Provision of the platform and services
content.rights_li_3: Right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority
content.sharing_li_1: Payment service providers (e.g., Stripe, PayPal or other PSPs)
content.sharing_li_3: No transfer to third parties for advertising purposes

privacy.subtitle: How we process data — transparent and purpose-bound.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy (GDPR)

content.callout_body: Payments are also subject to the T&Cs/policies of payment providers (fees, deadlines, review processes). Subm8 facilitates payments but does not sell services itself.
content.gifts_li_1: Gifts are voluntary transfers between users and are generally final (non-refundable).
content.gifts_li_2: Exceptions: legally mandatory, clear technical error (e.g., double charge) or verified fraud.
content.p_chargebacks: In case of chargebacks/fraud we may temporarily suspend the account and withhold payouts until clarified. Abusive chargebacks can lead to suspension.
content.p_tech: For double charges or incorrect bookings we refund after review. Please contact us within 14 days of discovery with transaction ID and evidence.
content.process_li_2: We review within a reasonable period and inform you about the result and any refund channel.
content.process_li_3: Refunds are generally issued via the same payment method.
content.subs_li_1: Subscriptions can be cancelled at any time, effective at the next billing date.
content.subs_li_2: Amounts already paid for the current period are not refunded pro rata unless required by law.

refund.subtitle: Refund rules for gifts, subscriptions and errors.
refund.title: Refund Policy

content.audience_li_1: Use restricted to 18+; we may require age/identity verification.
content.audience_li_2: The platform may contain NSFW/adult content. Minors and non-consensual content are prohibited.
content.callout_body: Gifts are voluntary, non-refundable, and not tied to services. Subm8 only facilitates. You are responsible for separately agreed services (incl. taxes).
content.fees_li_1: Subm8 charges a platform fee (e.g., 10%) and any provider fees.
content.fees_li_2: For gifts, a surcharge may be shown to payers (“on top”). The displayed “amount to creator” is the base amount credited to recipients.
content.fees_li_3: Payouts occur from a minimum amount and after internal checks (including risk/compliance).
content.fees_li_4: Chargebacks/fraud: we may temporarily suspend accounts and withhold funds until clarified.
content.liability_li_1: We are not liable for actions/services of third parties (other users, payment providers).
content.liability_li_2: The platform is provided “as is”; use at your own risk to the extent permitted by law.
content.p_changes: We may amend these terms; we will notify you of material changes in-app/web in due time.
content.p_law: The law of the operator’s seat applies (see imprint), excluding conflict-of-law rules, unless mandatory consumer protection law dictates otherwise.
content.p_roles: Subm8 enables interactions between Dommes and Subs.
content.p_scope: These Terms of Service apply to the use of the Subm8 platform (“platform,” “we”) by registered users (“users,” “you”). By registering, you agree to these terms.
content.roles_li_1: You own the rights to your content and do not violate laws or third-party rights.
content.roles_li_2: Prohibited: inter alia, non-consensual depictions, minors, glorification of violence, hate/discrimination.
content.roles_li_3: We may moderate, block, or remove content to enforce laws and these terms.
content.tax_li_1: You are responsible for your tax treatment (e.g., income tax, possibly VAT) in your country, where applicable.
content.tax_li_2: Subm8 is not a party to services separately agreed between users.
content.tax_li_3: Where Subm8 is legally required to report/withhold, we will do so.
content.termination_li_1: You can delete your account at any time (statutory retention remains unaffected).
content.termination_li_2: We may suspend/remove accounts and delay/deny payouts if laws, these terms, or security policies are violated.
content.tips_li_1: Voluntary gifts: tips are voluntary transfers from user to user.
content.tips_li_2: No service fee: tips are not payments for goods/services and create no entitlement to specific content, responses, or actions.
content.tips_li_3: Platform role: Subm8 merely facilitates the transfer (intermediary) and does not determine how recipients use tips.
content.tips_li_4: Finality: after confirmation, gifts are generally final and non-refundable (exceptions: legally mandatory or clear technical error; see Refund Policy).
content.tips_li_5: Services ≠ gifts: services agreed separately (e.g., coaching, custom content) are not “gifts.” Such services may require taxes/consumer protections (provider’s own responsibility).
